serverInfo.name: Astraeusio Space Weather
serverInfo.description: Real-time space weather data and ML-powered geomagnetic storm forecasting. Access Kp index, solar wind, X-ray flux, IMF Bz, Dst, ISS position, near-Earth objects, and 3-hour Kp predictions with 95% confidence intervals.

tools.name: get_kp_index
tools.description: Get the current and recent Kp index readings (1-minute resolution)

tools.name: get_solar_wind
tools.description: Get current solar wind speed and density from NOAA DSCOVR

tools.name: get_kp_forecast
tools.description: Get ML-predicted Kp index for the next 3 hours with 95% confidence interval

tools.name: get_xray_flux
tools.description: Get GOES X-ray flux readings for solar flare detection

tools.name: get_imf
tools.description: Get interplanetary magnetic field Bz and Bt (key geomagnetic storm driver)

tools.name: get_dst_index
tools.description: Get Disturbance Storm Time index measuring ring current energy

tools.name: get_space_weather_alerts
tools.description: Get active NOAA space weather watches, warnings, and alerts

tools.name: get_anomalies
tools.description: Get detected anomalies: Kp storms, solar wind spikes, X-ray flares, asteroid close approaches

tools.name: get_neo_close_approaches
tools.description: Get NASA near-Earth object close approaches for the next 7 days

tools.name: get_iss_position
tools.description: Get current ISS position, altitude, and velocity

tools.name: get_health
tools.description: Get service health status for all data sources
